decision_reason: Literal graph_edges traversal is safe to wire: it improved associative evidence recall by at least 5%, preserved non-associative quality, produced no scope leak, stayed within the p95 latency budget, and exercised a real two-edge path.
notes: The standard and literal arms use the same golden dataset and search implementation; the standard arm sets graph weight to zero.
Associative hop_path metadata seeds trusted mentions/touches_file edges through the typed provenance contract before literal-arm queries run.
Entity BFS remains informational and does not decide whether literal graph_edges traversal is wired.
